candidates.title: Player settings and accessibility family
candidates.objective: Define reusable settings semantics for audio, graphics, controls, comfort, localization, and accessibility without coupling them to one UI renderer.
source_requirements: Official platform and engine settings guidance
Accessibility guidance from shipped-game or industry authorities
Renderer, persistence, input, and XR comfort boundary review
candidates.exact_next_action: Independently review the positive-source manifest, architecture boundary and verification contract before admitting package identifiers or blueprints.

candidates.title: Semantic interaction family
candidates.objective: Define engine-light interaction intents and replaceable desktop, controller, tracked-ray, hand, and gaze adapters without transferring evidence across modalities.
source_requirements: Official OpenXR and engine interaction guidance
Shipped platform interaction principles for controller, hand, and gaze
Capability, accessibility, comfort, and named-device evidence boundaries
candidates.exact_next_action: Decide whether the common semantic core is sufficiently stable to justify a cross-device source gate.
